taxonomy: Tetramolopium klossii is a species of flowering plant in the family Asteraceae. It belongs to the genus Tetramolopium, which is a group of small shrubs native to the Pacific islands. Tetramolopium klossii is specifically endemic to the island of New Guinea. The classification of Tetramolopium klossii places it within the subclass Asteridae, which is a large and diverse group of flowering plants. This classification helps to identify and distinguish Tetramolopium klossii from other similar species within the plant kingdom.
